name: SEO Keyword Research & Volume Analyzer
description: Takes a list of SEO keywords, researches search volume and competition data via Exa, uses Claude AI to analyze keyword difficulty and prioritize opportunities, and saves a comprehensive keyword research report to Google Sheets with a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's Google Keyword Planner search volume workflow.

source.originalName: Generate SEO keyword search volume data using Google API

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for keyword research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving the report

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

keywords.description: Comma-separated list of SEO keywords to research (e.g. 'ai chatbot, workflow automation, no-code tools')

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the keyword report

targetWebsite.description: Target website URL for competition analysis (e.g. 'example.com')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for SEO keyword analysis
Build Sheets rows from keyword analysis
Save keyword report to Google Sheets
